case_title: AUGUSTUS ALBANO VS. VICTOR VALENCIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBANO, AUGUSTUS AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA, VICTOR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-03-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-11-2014

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-21-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF AUGUSTUS ALBANO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 6/13/14. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-03-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
